text:

From-To: open->feedback

Hi Oliver. It looks like textproc/refdb didn't working with php 5.4 and 
there is no new version available. You should try to revert to php 5.3 
and check if it fixes the issue for you. There is also link that may be 
useful: 
http://stackoverflow.com/questions/8971261/php-5-4-call-time-pass-by-reference-easy-fix-available
